title: monoQA: Multi-Task Learning of Reranking and Answer Extraction for Open-Retrieval Conversational Question Answering
research_areas: T03 Dialogue, Conversational Systems, Chatbots, Human-Robot Interaction
T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering
